title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Jimmy (James McGregor) informs Anthony of a mysterious package he received containing the memoirs of Count Stapfitch, the former Prime Minister of Hesoslovakia and a powerful political figure in the Balkan Peninsula. Jimmy recounts that four years ago in Paris, he rescued the Count from a group of thugs. Following the assassination of King Nikolai IV—whose reign ended in a republic after a popular uprising against his marriage to a commoner, Empress Farajia—the Count had settled in Paris. 

Two weeks ago, Jimmy received the manuscript along with a letter promising £1,000 if it is delivered to a London publisher by October 13th. Because Jimmy has already booked a trip to Cape Town to travel through the interior of Africa, he cannot complete the delivery. Anthony agrees to take the job for a quarter of the reward (£100), and the two men agree that Anthony will travel on the ship *Granada* using Jimmy's name.

As they finalize their plans, Anthony expresses skepticism regarding the logistics of the delivery, questioning why the Count's estate would send a manuscript from France through Africa to England rather than mailing it directly. Anthony muses that the publication of such biographies often causes trouble, suggesting that the deceased Count may have intended to stir up controversy from beyond the grave.
